description: Solves equations algebraically. Returns the solution value for use in subsequent expressions.
utility: Find solutions to polynomial and algebraic equations

examples.scenario: Solve equation and plot root on graph
examples.expression:
f(x) = cos(x) - x
plot_1 = plot(G, f)
s1 = solve(f, "x", 1)
P = point(G, s1, 0)
